preorder_price_source: Retailer preorder listings at launch (approximately $80-90 range; $85 used as midpoint)

pull_rates.note: 1 SP guaranteed per box; 6 SP cards in set
Approximately 1 SSP per 4 boxes; 4 SSP cards in set
Estimated ~8 RRR per box (standard WS distribution)

competitive_notes: NIKKE Vol.1 has minimal competitive presence in EN WS. The IP is a mobile game without a major anime tournament arc. Cards see some casual play but not BCS top-8 representation.
notes: Simultaneous EN/JP release. Preorder price estimated from retailer records — actual prices varied by retailer. Set code NK/W86-E verified. Pull rate data estimated from community sources; official pull rate PDF not available at time of writing.
